parameters: I've camped out all night waiting for the new xbox!
I don't care what everyone else says about you, you're great
Love is like a full moon
You only find it drunk on a friday
And it ends up being a lamppost
Look at all those lowborns on the other side of the barrier
This is the only spot in the building i get Wifi
Nothing like a good line to pick me up!
LAAAAAAAAA
AAAAAAAAA
....AAAA
...yup, this side of the lobby has much better acoustics
Are you here for the new labubu collection too?
I'm not allowed in yet, i've got a 2pm ticket
Eeek he's going to sign the annual report!
Typical, i came here to pickpocket and the guy in front
has a 3310.
Surely the toilets cant be this busy?
My interviewer quickly popped out to get some milk
It's been two years
Always put the word "suprisingly" before any compliment
to make it backhanded
I knew I should have bought an advanced ticket!
Why isn't my tamagotchi hatching?
I just got kicked out the auditorium.
Management are adamant everyone is dressed appropriately for
the Rocky Horror screening.
Whats your favourite film involving centipedes?
Have you got guestlist? Else its £20 and no re-entry.
What a lovely wall, is it for sale?
Please take any deliveries to the post room.
Unless you're an EVRI driver, then just take the post home
Did you hear DFS has a sale on?
If you ask security nicely
They'll let you put piles of fruit below the lift to squeeze
the juice out of them
My plan is to press all the lift buttons and run
Welcome to UNICEF!
That wall exists for a reason.
Would you mind taking a picture for my Bebo profile?
If you run at the back wall hard enough with a trolley
You get into UNICEF
I've got a girlfriend
She goes to a different regulator
Heard the goss on the product misspelling scandal?
Wanna recreate the lobby scene from the Matrix?
The trick is to quickly follow someone through the barrier
The clairvoyant at Selfridges said i'd find the love of my
life right here
Job Interviews to the right
Police interviews, go straight until you hear screaming
This is the best spot in the whole building to feel the air
conditioning
I preffered it when this place was a Toys R Us
Regulator?
I barely know here!
Whats your favourite seasoning?
Mines ground floor
Looks like waits back on the menu boys!
I'm late for the board meeting!
Sorry, this revolving door is off limits until someone
learns to animate it.
This door has been apprehended on suspicion of involvement
in organised crime.
We're out of visitor badges and temporary tatoos.
Gather here for the lift tour, we'll be starting shortly.
This place does open until 11am!
The lecturn in the auditorium has a beer pipe
connected to here

The FCA, NCA and UNICEF all in the same building

Me neither
